traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user uses {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Serve Cold{/g}, she must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer 1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g}.
This augment malfunctions while Jae is suffering from the {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g} effect. The damage dealt by Jae is reduced by −30%.

This augment malfunctions while Jae is suffering from a {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}. The damage dealt by Jae is reduced by −30%.

This {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions while Jae is suffering from a {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}. The damage dealt by Jae is reduced by −30%.

languages.text: Каждый раз, когда обладатель аугмента использует способность {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Горячий прием{/g}, он должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} или получить +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}утомления{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Serve Cold{/g}, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigued{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Каждый раз, когда обладатель аугмента использует способность {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Горячий прием{/g}, он должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}или получить +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}утомления{/g}.

Каждый раз, когда обладатель аугмента использует способность {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Горячий прием{/g}, он должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}или получить +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}утомления{/g}.

languages.text: Quand l'utilisatrice lance {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Froide vengeance{/g}, elle doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g}. En cas d'échec, elle reçoit +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}Fatigue{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Soğuk Yenen{/g} kabiliyetini kullandığında bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}yorgunluk{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.

Aksi takdirde +1 {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}yorgunluk{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.

languages.text: 使用者每次使用{g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}冷酷侍奉{/g}时，都必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则承受1层{g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}疲劳{/g}效果。

traits.locale_text: 使用者每次使用{g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}冷酷侍奉{/g}时，都必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则承受1层{g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}疲劳{/g}效果。

languages.text: Cada vez que el usuario utiliza {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Servido en frío{/g}, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} para no recibir +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigado{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Serve Cold{/g}, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigued{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que el usuario utiliza {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Servido en frío{/g}, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} para no recibir +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigado{/g}.

languages.text: Setzt der Nutzer {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Eiskalt serviert{/g} ein, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} bestehen, um nicht mit +1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}Erschöpft{/g} belegt zu werden.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Serve Cold{/g}, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigued{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Setzt der Nutzer {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Eiskalt serviert{/g} ein, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} bestehen, um nicht mit +1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}Erschöpft{/g} belegt zu werden.

languages.text: 使用者が{g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}冷めた復讐{/g}を使用するたびに、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}耐久力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ、{g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}疲労{/g}を+1スタック受ける。

traits.locale_text: 使用者が{g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}冷めた復讐{/g}を使用するたびに、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}耐久力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ、{g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}疲労{/g}を+1スタック受ける。
